message:
Add multi-signal prefix search scorer and rewrite copy from corporate "we" to personal voice

- Add new multi-signal scorer (scorer.ts) implementing Algolia-style instant
  prefix/substring/exact matching with field-weighted scoring (title=10, id=8,
  tags=5, description=3, content=1) and coverage bonus for multi-token queries
- Rewrite search engine to blend multi-signal scorer (90%) with BM25 tiebreaker
  (10%), enabling partial prefix queries like "rob" to immediately match "robot"
- Add comprehensive test suite for prefix/substring search including partial
  prefix, exact ID, multi-word narrowing, quickSearch, and empty query tests
- Export scorePrompt, scoreAll, FIELD_WEIGHTS, and ScorerResult from search index
- Rewrite user-facing copy across 11 files from impersonal corporate "we/us/our
  team" to first-person singular "I/me/my" voice to reflect solo-developer brand:
  contact page, guidelines, pricing, privacy, error page, appeals, suspended
  account, moderation enforcement, appeal form, report dialog, and featured store
- Update "Staff Pick" description from "Hand-picked by our team" to "Hand-picked
  by Jeff" in admin featured page and featured-store types
- Change team contact email from team@jeffreysprompts.com to jeff@jeffreysprompts.com
- Update ReportDialog test assertion to match new first-person copy

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
